problem id: c180cdec
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(5) XOR SHR(2)

examples:
  00000000 -> 00000000
  11100010 -> 01111000
  00111011 -> 01101110
  11111011 -> 01011110
  10111110 -> 11101111
  10101000 -> 00101010
  01011010 -> 01010110
  10011111 -> 11000111
  00110011 -> 01101100
  01011110 -> 11010111

query: 00010000
predicted answer: 00000100
